status: PARTIAL — Router + both SY adapters deployed & initialized; FissionFactory + 2 deployer helpers blocked on operator HBAR balance.

history.blocker_resolved: FissionFactory at 71KB runtime exceeded Hedera's 15M gas-per-tx ContractCreate cap (INSUFFICIENT_GAS / MAX_GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDED). Fixed by extracting `new FissionMarket(...)` and `new FissionMarketRewards(...)` into StandardMarketDeployer.sol + RewardsMarketDeployer.sol. Added `factory_` param to both Market constructors (with `address(0)` fallback so tests don't need updating in setUp). FissionFactory shrunk 71KB → 8KB. Tests: 252/252 pass.
history.blocker_open: Repeated failed FissionFactory deploy attempts (14M / 15M / 30M gas, file uploads) consumed ~260 HBAR. Operator balance is now 10.48 HBAR — insufficient for the 3 remaining deploys (~30-50 HBAR needed).

remaining: Run: ROUTER_ADDRESS=… SY_HBARX_ADDRESS=… SY_SAUCER_V2_LP_ADDRESS=… node scripts/deploy-mainnet-sdk.mjs (will deploy 2 deployers + Factory)
Wait 7 days, then confirmSY + createMarket / createRewardsMarket
